---
name: Feature request / idea
about: Suggest a feature, plugin, or improvement
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or change.

**Why / use case**
What problem does it solve, or what does it enable?

**Scope (if you know)**
Firmware engine / sound processor / macro-preset layer / REST API / WebUI / docs / build?

**Willing to work on it?**
Yes / no / maybe — and any constraints (see CONTRIBUTING.md, including the CLA).
